/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/trading_engine.dir/src/client/trading_engine.cpp.o -o trading_engine   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/jsoncpp/1.9.8/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/jsoncpp/1.9.8/lib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -ljsoncpp
